l10n.hint.resdir: To override .res files, mirror the JAR layout under ~/.haven/l10n/en/ and restart.
opt.integ.bot_bridge_hint: Secret matches API_SECRET in the bot .env. The client listens for POST /notify and sends heartbeats to the bot URL. «Save & apply» restarts the bridge.
opt.integ.bot_listen_host: Host in notifyUrl for the bot (if notify URL below is empty):
menugrid.keyboard.tip: When off, the menu grid only reacts to the mouse.
bulk.station.title: Bulk workstations
bulk.station.fill: Bulk fill: RMB item-use (or drop) with the configured modifiers on a station
bulk.station.fill.tip: Enable the modifiers below (default Shift+Alt), then right-click the station with the item (or drop with the same modifiers held). Prim smelter “full” batch sizes: add Ctrl. Left-click still drops on the ground.
bulk.station.modmask.tip: All checked keys must be held when you itemact or drop toward a station to start auto-repeat. If none would remain, Shift+Alt is restored.
bulk.station.modalt.tip: Matches the Alt/Meta bit used for map modifiers.
bulk.station.debugwire.tip: Print [MoonInvWire] lines for inventory wdgmsg and bulk replay (stderr).
bulk.station.takeall: Ctrl + RMB: take all from station windows
bulk.station.takeall.tip: After the normal map click, send xfer to ISBoxes in the opened station window.
bulk.station.stallrepeats.tip: 0 = off. If the hand stack does not update after this many bulk replays, stop (avoids endless itemact when the server ignores repeats).
bulk.station.tubfirst: Tanning tub: swallow first itemact (empty hand)
bulk.station.tubfirst.tip: Default off: first itemact is sent, then automation runs. Turn on only if your server must not see that first click.
bulk.station.blacklist.tip: Checked = do not use bulk fill or Ctrl take-all on that station type.
tp.fail.mapseg: That point is not reachable from the current map segment.
tp.pick.on: Map point picking enabled: click the world map or minimap.
